items.title: Java (Basic)
items.description: Successfully cleared the HackerRank Java (Basic) Skill Certification. Demonstrated proficiency in Core Java, Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), Exception Handling, Basic Data Structures, and problem-solving using Java.

items.title: SQL (Basic)
items.description: Successfully cleared the HackerRank SQL (Basic) Skill Certification. Demonstrated practical knowledge of SQL queries, joins, filtering, aggregation functions, grouping, and relational database fundamentals.

items.title: GenAI Powered Data Analytics Job Simulation
items.description: Successfully completed the GenAI Powered Data Analytics Job Simulation by Tata through Forage. Worked on AI-driven collections strategy, exploratory data analysis, predictive risk profiling, delinquency prediction, and business reporting.

items.title: AI for Students: Build Your Own Generative AI Model
items.description: Successfully completed the AI for Students: Build Your Own Generative AI Model program by NextWave. Learned Generative AI fundamentals, Prompt Engineering, and AI application development.

items.title: National Level Hackathon Participation
items.description: Participated in the National Level Hackathon 2026 organized by G H Raisoni University. Developed 'AegisPay', an AI-powered predictive system for early detection and prevention of cyber financial crimes using real-time risk scoring.

items.title: Internet of Things (IoT) Workshop using Arduino
items.description: Successfully attended a hands-on workshop on Internet of Things (IoT) using Arduino. Learned sensor interfacing, Arduino programming, embedded systems fundamentals, and smart hardware prototyping.
